title: Automated Precision Scale
description: Arduino-based digital scale using a 5 kg load cell and HX711 24-bit ADC. Measurements displayed on a 16×2 LCD or OLED with tare function (rotary encoder press). Records maximum weight and allows unit toggle (g / oz). Optionally logs readings to a serial host or microSD card.
objective: Measure 0–5 kg with resolution ≤ 0.5 g and repeatability ±1 g; tare zeroing on button press; display in g and oz; auto-off after 5 minutes idle.
constraints: 5 V USB or 4 × AA batteries; TAL220B 5 kg load cell; ≤ £15 BOM; compact 3D-printed platform with overload protection.
supporting_fact_titles: HX711 24-Bit ADC for Load Cell and Wheatstone Bridge Amplification
OLED SSD1306 Monochrome Display I²C Interface
Rotary Encoder — Incremental A/B Quadrature Pulse Counting
design_element_titles: HX711 Load Cell Precision Weighing Interface

element_usage_notes.HX711 Load Cell Precision Weighing Inter: TAL220B 5 kg; HX711 gain 128 channel A; DOUT=D3, CLK=D4; 8-sample average per display update; tare stored in EEPROM; scale_factor calibrated with 500 g known weight.
element_usage_notes.SSD1306 OLED Display UI Module: 128×64; large weight display in g (top 2/3) and oz (bottom row); MAX indicator; TARE label flashes 500 ms on tare press.
element_usage_notes.Rotary Encoder User-Interface Navigation: KY-040; short press = TARE; long press (1 s) = toggle g/oz unit; rotate unused for scale function.
element_usage_notes.Arduino Uno/Nano MCU Platform: Nano 3.0; HX711 D3/D4; I²C OLED A4/A5; encoder D2 (CLK INT0) / D4 / D3 (SW); auto-sleep via MCU power-down after 5 min idle.

element_interactions.from: HX711 Load Cell Precision Weighing Interface
element_interactions.data: weight_g (float, ±0.5 g resolution) via HX711 clocked read every 12.5 ms (80 SPS)
element_interactions.description: 8 consecutive readings averaged; result stored in circular buffer; displayed at 5 Hz. Tare offset stored in EEPROM at address 0 (float, 4 bytes). MAX weight tracked and displayed.

element_interactions.data: short press = TARE event; long press = unit toggle via GPIO INT
element_interactions.description: Short press: zero offset = current raw reading; EEPROM updated; TARE flash on OLED. Long press: toggle unit enum (g ↔ oz); conversion: oz = g × 0.035274.
OLED refreshed at 5 Hz. Large font for main weight; small font for MAX/unit row. No weight change for 5 minutes → MCU enters sleep mode (wake on encoder press).
